issues.description: Action type 'RevealFromHand' is incorrect for placing cards at top/bottom of deck. Should be 'PlayFromHand' with a 'placement' parameter, or a custom action like 'PlaceDeckCard' that specifies top/bottom positioning. RevealFromHand does not match the effect of placing cards into the deck.
Missing 'placement' or equivalent property to specify 'top or bottom of your deck'. The DSL must indicate the player chooses placement location.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Draw 2 cards and place 2 cards from your hand at the top or bottom of your deck in any order.
